ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Short description of the event */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams that can participate in the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the puzzle */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the puzzle (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "puzzle_category" TEXT /* Category of the puzzle (e.g., logic, pattern recognition, physical challenge) */,
  "puzzle_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the puzzle */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Brief description of the puzzle solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the team is participating in */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, event_manager, team_leader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_managers" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_completions" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle completion */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that completed the puzzle */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle completed */,
  "incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses made by the team */,
  "unlock_time" TEXT /* Time when the team unlocked the puzzle */,
  "solve_time" TEXT /* Time when the team solved the puzzle */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the puzzle completion (e.g., completed, abandoned, skipped) */,
  "completion_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments from the team or event organizers about the puzzle completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_completions_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_completions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle attempt */,
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding puzzle completion */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Time of the puzzle attempt */,
  "attempt_result" TEXT /* Result of the puzzle attempt (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_completion_id FOREIGN KEY ("completion_id") REFERENCES puzzle_completions ("completion_id")
)
